gist.headline: Watering the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, updating the metrics and health checks for all the community apps in our greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and the greenhouse directory.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory up-to-date with the latest health statuses and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener, checking on the health of the community apps represented as a digital greenhouse. A clipboard or chart represents the metrics update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, holding a small clipboard and checking on a digital greenhouse filled with code-plants in lime green (#ecf874) pots. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, holding a small clipboard and checking on a digital greenhouse filled with code-plants in lime green (#ecf874) pots. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
